title: Delete Duplicate Emails
input_format: Table: Person with columns id (int, primary key), email (varchar)
output_format: The Person table after deleting all duplicate emails, keeping only the row with the smallest id for each unique email
example_input:
Table: Person
| id | email            |
| 1  | john@example.com |
| 2  | bob@example.com  |
| 3  | john@example.com |
constraints:
- 1 <= Person.id <= 10^4
- email is a valid email string
